featureDetection.rationale: Inspects round-trip parsing integrity using the host browser's live engine, showing a dynamic verdict based on whether angle brackets mutated the DOM.

gracefulFallback.rationale: The step-by-step round-trip demonstration performs successfully on any modern or legacy browser, visualizing the mutation effect.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Allows loading multiple preset payloads or typing custom inputs to walk through and trigger the round-trip logic.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Demos a crucial security mitigation case step-by-step (input -> attr -> outerHTML -> re-parse).

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows the design system variables faithfully with red/green feedback blocks for safe/unsafe states.

references.rationale: Links directly to the required chromestatus.com/feature/6264983847174144 reference.
